findings.design_reference: devops-operations lens / README install.sh native shell entrypoint / proposals/153 AC1-AC2
findings.comment: The diff changes install.sh and every bin/specrew* shell wrapper from mode 100755 to 100644. These are documented and packaged as native macOS/Linux entrypoints, and existing runtime tests exercise ./bin/specrew directly; shipping them non-executable breaks direct invocation and installed wrapper behavior on Unix. Preserve executable bits for install.sh and the committed bin/* shell wrappers; do not let a Windows checkout normalize them to 100644.

findings.design_reference: process-context no unplanned scope; specs/198-beta2-hardening/tasks.md Iteration 001 owns no bin/install shell mode changes; README.md native install command surface; CHANGELOG.md wrapper execute bit regression guard
findings.comment: The change-set removes the executable bit from bin/specrew, the other bin/specrew-* launchers, install.sh, and shell integration tests (100755 -> 100644) without any task or drift record covering this surface. These files are the documented macOS/Linux native command/install surface; shipping them non-executable can reintroduce the Permission denied class and is outside the approved iteration-001 planning/toolchain/firewall scope.
